subject: [PATCH v2 1/9] nfsd: defer vfree of compound ops to fix rpc_status UAF

2026-06-02.patch_summary: This patch fixes a use-after-free bug in the NFSv4 server by deferring the freeing of compound operation buffers until after an RCU grace period. The rpc_status netlink dumpit walks in-flight requests and reads opnums from these buffers, but the buffers are freed synchronously elsewhere in the code. By using kvfree_rcu_mightsleep() to defer the free, the patch ensures that the dumpit can safely read the buffers without accessing freed memory.
